scripts.build: prisma generate && rm -rf dist && tsc && node scripts/ensure-public-output.mjs
scripts.test: node --test lib/networkCallRules.test.js lib/vimlShadowImpact.test.mjs lib/agentGateRegexComment.test.mjs lib/shadowImpactResolve.test.mjs lib/vimlPolicyIdeActions.test.mjs lib/rulesLibraryVimlSql.test.mjs && tsc -p tsconfig.tests.json && node --test dist-test/viml/viml.rego.test.js dist-test/viml/viml.parser.fixture.test.js dist-test/viml/evaluatePolicy.viml.integration.test.js dist-test/viml/viml.snapshot.test.js && npm --prefix dashboard test
scripts.db:migrate:sql: echo "Apply migrations/001_ambit_decision_logs.sql to your Neon DB"
